rows.notes: README and STATUS should keep the H44/H43/R46 release-control stack explicit while preserving narrow non-goals.
The human release checklist should point at the current H43-era machine guards and downstream ledgers.
Release summary and blog rules must remain downstream of the landed H43 stack.
The manuscript, bundle-status, freeze-candidate, main-text, and appendix ledgers should continue to agree.
Release-candidate, submission, claim, and archival ledgers should expose the same current H45/H43 release-control split without reviving earlier control states.
The worktree hygiene snapshot should classify current release-commit readiness and rule out diff-check content issues.
The current release-preflight surface depends on the landed H43/R44/R45/R43/P27/P28 stack plus the standing P5/H2 and V1 audits.
